description: Box-Behnken (BBD) response-surface DOE: fits a quadratic without using the extreme corner combinations; returned in real units with a randomized run order.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[low,high]}, >=3), center (int, default 1), randomize (bool, default true), seed (int). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Needs >=3 factors and never visits the all-low/all-high corners, so it can't characterize response there. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
